/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/candy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/NFont/NFont.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/NFont/SDL_FontCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/image_png.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/keyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/mouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/sound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/sprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/stb_vorbis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/video.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/test/test.cpp.o -o p2_project  -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2_gfx -lSDL2_test -lSDL2main -lSDL2 -lpng -lpng16
